leadText: The Scizorite (Japanese: ハッサムナイト Hassamnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Scizor to Mega Evolve into Mega Scizor.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Scizor , the Scizorite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Scizor if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Scizorite from Scizor. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Scizor, the Scizorite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Scizor when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Scizor will remain a Mega Scizor until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Scizor , the Scizorite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Scizor if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Scizorite from Scizor.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Scizor hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Scizor hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Scizor holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Frost Cavern (requires an upgraded Mega Ring ) OR AS Petalburg Woods (after defeating or capturing Groudon OR / Kyogre AS ) S M US UM Battle Tree (64 BP ) ZA Stone Emporium (after completing Main Mission 09: "Chase That Mysterious Pokémon!" ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period X Y Pokémon Center Battle Championship Scizor Japan May 19 to 25, 2014 June 23 to July 6, 2014
